title: WTab
description: A simple tablist plugin that is compatible with luckperms.
body:
# WTab A simple tablist plugin that is compatible with luckperms. > Currently, WTab is only supported on Paper. Spigot support may come in the Future. # Installing [Luckperms](https://luckperms.net/) is recommended. ### [Click here to install WTab](https://hangar.papermc.io/Wolkenlos/WTab). ## Versions Only tested on 1.19.x - 1.21.x yet, but it should work on every version from 1.16.x - 1.21.x . # Example Config ![A Minecraft-Tablist with Text. First row: "This is an exmaple". Second row: "that shows what is possible". Third row: The Player "Developer | TheSkyScout". Fourth row: "Woo:" followed by a lot of lines.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b15991a86946381b899ffd3cc4d48bb1195926c3.png) ### Header "This is an exmaple
that shows what is possible" ### Footer: "Woo: ||||||||||||||||||||||||"
